summary: Comprehensive testing of new valuation engine features completed. All backend APIs (12/12) passed. Frontend fully operational with new features: micro-score panel, search radius display, distance column in comparables, heatmap layer, and PDF export.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate returns 200 with valid payload
Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate returns search_radius_m in market_data (200m for test location)
Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate returns micro_score with all fields (score, detail, local_premium_pct, density_300m, price_homogeneity, local_median_sqm)
Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate comparables have distance_m field
Backend: POST /api/valuation/estimate base_source mentions 'médiane pondérée' not 'Moyenne parisienne'
Backend: GET /api/report/pdf/{valuation_id} returns valid PDF for existing valuation
Backend: GET /api/report/pdf/nonexistent returns 404
Backend: GET /api/listing/report/pdf/nonexistent returns 404
Backend: GET /api/address/search returns results
Backend: GET /api/valuation/{id} returns valuation data
Backend: GET /api/valuations returns list of valuations
Backend: Server health check passes
Frontend: Landing page loads with all navigation links (nav-analyze, nav-history, nav-settings)
Frontend: Landing page has 'Analyser une fiche agence' button
Frontend: /analyze page loads with upload zone (data-testid='listing-upload-zone')
Frontend: /analyze page has file input and analyze button
Frontend: Results page shows micro-score panel in Hypothèses tab with density_300m and local_premium_pct
Frontend: Results page shows search radius info in Comparables tab ('rayon de 200m — médiane pondérée')
Frontend: Results page Comparables tab shows distance column (11m for closest comparable)
Frontend: Results page Comparables map shows heatmap layer and search radius circle
Frontend: Results page PDF download button works and downloads PDF file
critical_code_review_comments: Note: Existing saved valuations in MongoDB don't have new fields (search_radius_m, distance_m, micro_score) since they were created with old algorithm. Only fresh estimations have these fields - this is expected behavior.
seed_data_creation: Created fresh valuation ID: a4278456-d469-4b25-845b-eccb2d32f8ff with new engine fields for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New valuation engine features tested: 1) Progressive radius DVF search (200m→300m→500m→800m), 2) Weighted median price (distance+freshness), 3) Micro-score computation with density_300m and local_premium_pct, 4) search_radius_m and distance_m fields in response, 5) base_source mentions 'médiane pondérée'. Fresh valuation ID a4278456-d469-4b25-845b-eccb2d32f8ff can be used for future testing with new fields. Old valuation ca781754-4fdc-45bb-8a46-8faac27c9b07 doesn't have new fields.
